def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch)[0] != 'C')  # remove controls
    # remove diacritics
    s = ''.join(c for c in s if not unicodedata.combining(c))
    # unify Arabic letters
    rep = {
        'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا','ٱ':'ا',
        'ى':'ي','ئ':'ي','ؤ':'و',
        'ة':'ه',
        'ٰ':'', 'ـ':'',
    }
    s = ''.join(rep.get(c,c) for c in s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]+', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_query = normalize_arabic(query_full)
norm_query[:200], len(norm_query)

import unicodedata
def normalize_arabic2(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # Remove tashkeel (diacritics)
    s = ''.join(ch for ch in s if not unicodedata.category(ch).startswith('M'))
    # Normalize letters
    mapping = {
        'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا','ٱ':'ا',
        'ى':'ي','ئ':'ي','ؤ':'و',' ة':'ه',
        'ة':'ه','ٰ':'','ـ':'',
    }
    s = ''.join(mapping.get(ch,ch) for ch in s)
    # Replace punctuation with space
    s = ''.join(' ' if unicodedata.category(ch).startswith('P') else ch for ch in s)
    # Remove Arabic tatweel, quotes
    s = s.replace('ـ',' ')
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

norm_query2 = normalize_arabic2(query_full)
norm_query2, len(norm_query2)
